summary: sea-bound-siren postinstall script exfiltrates host information to remote endpoint
details: The package's postinstall.js executes automatically on `npm install` and uses child_process together with curl and http.request to transmit host identification (os.hostname() and related system info) to an external destination. The combination of a postinstall lifecycle hook, child_process.exec of curl, and an http.request call carrying os.hostname() is the canonical install-time host-beacon pattern — it provides no functionality to the installer and only benefits the publisher by reporting on machines where the package lands. This fires automatically on default install with no user opt-in.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
